trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h candle close above EMA20 ($0.89) following a successful retest of the $0.89 support
confluence_signals: OI rising + price rising trend continuation
Price currently above all three 1h EMAs
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: The combination of healthy OI accumulation and weak volume on the recent pullback suggests a continuation of the 24h bullish trend, supported by extreme market-wide fear which historically marks local bottoms.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price sustaining above EMA200 ($54.13) on 1h timeframe
confluence_signals: L/S Ratio at 0th percentile (extreme short crowd)
Funding velocity accelerating negative indicating a potential short squeeze
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Highest win rate due to extreme positioning divergence: the 0th percentile L/S ratio indicates the retail crowd is heavily shorting into a bullish MACD structure, creating high probability for a short-squeeze reversal.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: Pullback to EMA20 ($433.21) while RSI cools from overbought levels
confluence_signals: OI rising + price rising trend confirmation
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Significant smart money inflow combined with an extreme short retail bias (6th percentile L/S) provides a strong buffer for a long entry on a technical pullback to the EMA cluster.

trade_plans.invalidation: Break below $3.00 psychological and technical support
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: The positive funding acceleration suggests shorts are becoming increasingly expensive to maintain, likely leading to a squeeze toward resistance, though lower volume on the move up limits the win rate to 60%.

results.cross_asset_insight: Extreme Fear (12) across the market suggests a macro-exhaustion of sellers. High correlations (0.78-0.83) between FIL, LTC, and UNI indicate a synchronized relief rally is likely. LTC and BCH show the strongest contrarian signals due to extreme short-side retail positioning.
